headline: These Two Nvidia-Backed Companies Are Joining the S&P 500 Later This Month
summary: Nvidia partners Coherent and Lumentum, along with two other companies, are set to join the S&P 500 later this month.

raw.headline: These Two Nvidia-Backed Companies Are Joining the S&P 500 Later This Month

headline: Telecom stocks have had a great start to the year — and they’re still quite cheap
summary: Several companies in the S 500’s communications sector trade at low price-to-earnings valuations, with attractive dividend yields well supported by cash flow.
